other_observers: Van Truan, Pearle Sandstrom-Smith, Clif Smith, Leon & Treva Bright.; Mark Peterson and Brad Steger saw the bird after 11am on 11/07/2006.
description: A small dark goose, with thin white stripe around the neck. It had a small bill, that was black, all dark head, dark back, dark neck and belly. White under tail coverts.Behaviors: Swimming on the water and feeding the grass, with other Canada Geese and a immature Greater White-fronted Goose.Call: nonePlumage: adult
photographer: Photographer: Brandon Percival, Brandon K Percival, Brandon Percival, Brandon Percival
